onboarding_1_body: Find popular movies, read short stories, and choose what to watch next.
onboarding_2_body: A simple and clean app designed to make browsing movies fast and fun.
onboarding_3_body: Open a movie card, view details, and save your favorite movies for later.
login_subtitle: Login and continue your movie journey.
login_validation: Please enter a phone number and a password of at least 4 characters.
signup_subtitle: Create your movie account and start exploring.
signup_validation: Please complete the required fields, match passwords, and accept the terms.
otp_sent: OTP sent successfully. This is a demo message.
home_hero_body: Browse famous movies, open details, and build your watchlist with a clean Flutter UI.
dark_mode_subtitle: Switch between light and dark themes.
language_subtitle: Switch the app between English and Arabic.
about_app_body: CineBox is a Flutter midterm project for a multi-page movie app. It uses splash, onboarding, login, sign-up, home, settings, localization, dark mode, custom widgets, and a details page.
movie_inception_desc: A skilled thief enters people’s dreams to steal secrets, then receives a difficult mission that challenges reality, memory, and trust.
movie_interstellar_desc: A group of explorers travels through space to search for a new home for humanity while a father fights to keep hope alive for his family.
movie_dark_knight_desc: Batman faces a dangerous criminal mastermind in Gotham and must decide how far a hero can go to protect a city from chaos.
movie_titanic_desc: Two passengers from different worlds meet on the Titanic and experience a memorable story during the ship’s historic journey.
movie_avatar_desc: A former marine explores Pandora through an avatar body and discovers a new world full of life, conflict, and difficult choices.
movie_toy_story_desc: A group of toys comes to life when humans are away, and two very different toys learn the value of friendship and teamwork.
movie_finding_nemo_desc: A careful father crosses the ocean to find his son, meeting funny and brave characters along the way.
movie_spider_verse_desc: Miles Morales discovers his powers and joins heroes from different universes to protect the multiverse.
movie_lion_king_desc: A young lion prince grows through loss, friendship, and courage as he learns what it means to lead.
movie_matrix_desc: A hacker discovers that reality is not what it seems and joins a fight that changes his understanding of the world.
movie_up_desc: An elderly man and a young scout begin an unexpected journey using a flying house lifted by balloons.
movie_wall_e_desc: A small cleaning robot on Earth discovers love, curiosity, and a mission that could help humanity return home.
